key_insights.insight: One of the most valuable skills in the 21st century is the ability to consciously direct your attention.
key_insights.quote: One of the most valuable skills in the 21st century is to be able to decide where and how and when we put our attention

key_insights.insight: Before launching a business, it's critical to deeply research and understand the industry, allowing you to discover the 'magic' and alpha.
key_insights.quote: Spend months, sometimes years, researching what it is that you're intrigued about... is you finding the magic, finding the secret to this industry, discovering where the opportunity is, where the alpha is.

key_insights.insight: Don't rush into a new idea; take time to allow it to fully develop and solidify before acting.
key_insights.quote: Not rushing into new ideas, taking time to let them fully get ready before you move.

key_insights.insight: Deep work allows you to recognize that you can go a little bit slower because the market hasn't fully formed yet.
key_insights.quote: If you do the deep work, you recognize that you can go a little bit slower because the market hasn't fully formed yet.

key_insights.insight: Winning awards and press coverage are not always indicators of a successful business.
key_insights.quote: It's wonderful to be written about in,in the press. It's wonderful to win awards, but that is not what a successful business isbuilt on.

key_insights.insight: Creating your own IP (Intellectual Property) is a vital element for long-term success, setting yourself apart from others.
key_insights.quote: To do anything in business, you've really got to create something yourself, you know, make something that hasn't existed before.

key_insights.insight: It's okay to be vulnerable and to talk about your mental health to your partner, to your friends, to your boss.
key_insights.quote: Fact minds, that it is okay to be vulnerable and to talk about your mental health to your partner, to your friends, to your boss.Can you believe that?

key_insights.insight: It's better to respond to situations in life instead of reacting to them. Mindfulness changes reliance from the amygdala to prefrontal cortex thinking.
key_insights.quote: I nowrespond to situations in life instead of reacting... What if there was a slight pause, a fraction of a second where you held and you thoughtand you kicked in, your awareness enabled you to respond to that stimulationrather than reacting.

key_insights.insight: There's value in recognizing the pain that alerts to a problem instead of trying to mask it. Sleeplessness has a purpose.
key_insights.quote: Recognizing that that pain, that mental pain is there for a purpose it's my subconscious braintelling me to pay attention and to sort out a problem that i'm not addressing during my wakinghours

actionable_advice.advice: Develop a regular meditation practice to strengthen your mind's ability to manage stress and improve focus.
actionable_advice.how_to: Start with a few minutes of daily meditation using apps like Calm, focusing on your breath and cultivating awareness.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize sleep, nutrition, and exercise as fundamental building blocks for overall well-being.
actionable_advice.how_to: Aim for 7-9 hours of sleep, nourish your body with nutritious foods, and incorporate regular physical activity into your routine.

actionable_advice.advice: Cultivate meaningful connections with family and friends, and actively show up for them.
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule regular time for family and friends, listen actively, and be fully present in their company.

actionable_advice.advice: Actively listen and seek to understand the other person's point of view.
actionable_advice.how_to: Pause, let them talk, replay what they've said, and see that light come on their eyes.

actionable_advice.advice: Take regular breaks and mental health days to prevent burnout.
actionable_advice.how_to: Stepping away from the company, because it gave the whole company a chance to properly step away and recharge their batteries

memorable_stories: Burying a treasure worth £100,000 as part of Perplex City
Getting early orders at Firebox and a friend using secret names to buy things
contrarian_claims: The idea that everyone should take time off, like a mental health week, actually works and doesn't destroy a company.
The idea that meditation and mental health aren't 'woo woo' or hippie nonsense.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Calm App Founder: From $0 To $2 Billion By Making The World Meditate: Michael Acton Smith
